text.title: Product Development Trends 2026 Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: 2026 trend snapshot for indie SaaS
example.note: Source pool: 28 items, all within 2025-Q1 -> 2026-Q2. Buckets scored: on-device LLM (bet, kill='MLC regress 30%'), agent-as-product (monitor, trigger='first $5M ARR'), AI-native CRM (ignore), privacy-first/DSA (monitor), vibe-coding (bet, kill='Cursor/Windsurf consolidate to 1 player'), sustainability (ignore). 2025 retro: RAG-optimization bet 2025 -> now monitor (commoditized); on-device LLM 2025 monitor -> 2026 bet.
